chunks.text: He is an experienced consultancy leader and board member and has worked extensively across the public and private sectors in the UK, Europe and the Middle East. Anthony is extremely excited.

Fill in your details and one of our team will get back to you as soon as we can. Anthony Gaffney Partner Anthony. Gaffney@gateoneconsulting. com Anthony is the country manager for Gate One Ireland. He has nearly 20 years’ experience working with leading global organisations, delivering change across M&A, innovation, commercial excellence and digital transformation.

com Join us in Dublin We’re a consultancy with limitless possibilities. There’s no barrier to your ambition. To what you can achieve. Or to being yourself, as you collaborate with brilliant colleagues. Ready for a career that’s altogether more meaningful. View opportunities Get in touch We’re always excited to meet people who care deeply about what they do. Whether that’s ambitious clients, passionate partners or talented individuals looking to join a truly exceptional consulting team.

Our team brings proven experience in delivering end-to-end transformations to some of the world’s largest organisations. We combine this breadth with a distinctive emphasis on innovation and creativity, helping leaders design solutions that are practical, human and ready to scale. We’d love to explore how we can help you nurture change that transforms. Find us in Dublin Address Gate One, Havas Village, 48-50 Cuffe St, Dublin 2, D02 CX48, Ireland T | +353 1 614 5300 E | info@gateoneconsulting.

With a uniquely collaborative approach, we guide organisations through high‑impact business and digital transformation projects that deliver meaningful, lasting change. Our Dublin office is a core part of our story. Ireland is a key economic and digital hub, and from the heart of Dublin, we partner with ambitious organisations across the country to shape strategy, deliver complex programmes and build the capabilities needed to grow with confidence.

From the heart of the city, we partner with ambitious organisations across the country to help them thrive
